title: Ward 1908
hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.
location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing

villain.worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention.
villain.motive: Force public reckoning with erased patients.

arcs.title: Contact and Contradiction
arcs.summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

arcs.title: Interference and Doubt
arcs.summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.

arcs.title: Confrontation and Reckoning
arcs.summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.

beats.title: Night Update
beats.narrative: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes.

incomingMessages.text: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Intake ledger photo.
You read their names and still asked for proof. (Peripheral Presence)

responseOptions.label: Validate record edits against archive backups

responseOptions.label: Interview former nurse before night lock begins
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Interview former nurse before night lock begins

beats.title: Escalation Signal
beats.narrative: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk.

incomingMessages.text: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Orderly shift recording.

beats.title: Trust Fracture
beats.narrative: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.

incomingMessages.text: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Basement access override.
The contractor lies because he signed the wall shut. (Psychological Contact)

beats.title: Ultimatum Window
beats.narrative: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts.

incomingMessages.text: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Treatment wing floorplan.
Erase one more file and your ally never leaves ward level. (Active Interference)

beats.title: Confrontation Protocol
beats.narrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.

incomingMessages.text: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Intake ledger photo.
Confess one lie and I return one life. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Take private contact route for hidden confession

beats.title: Case Debrief
beats.narrative: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.

responseOptions.label: Proceed with controlled pressure
responseOptions.summary: Advance investigation while preserving evidence discipline.

endings.title: Clean Resolution
endings.summary: You restore patient truth and secure legal action against surviving conspirators.
endings.epilogue: Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.
endings.sequelHook: A tagged evidence box points to the next case.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: You reveal the abuse but trigger backlash against survivors' families.
endings.epilogue: The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.
endings.sequelHook: A surviving witness asks for help in a linked disappearance.

endings.title: Corruption Pact
endings.summary: You seal records permanently in exchange for temporary peace.
endings.epilogue: You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.
endings.sequelHook: Season continuity marks the player as compromised.

nodes.label: The Record Keeper
nodes.summary: Primary antagonist operating through layered identities.

nodes.label: Renovation Contractor Jo Pike
nodes.summary: Possible accomplice with motive and access.

nodes.label: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing

timeline.summary: Witness account conflicts with archive records.
Villain contact shifts to direct intimidation.

playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. Your pattern-recognition profile flagged a match with prior unresolved incidents.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: The Record Keeper has fixated on The player detective profile. If the case stalls, collateral witnesses remain exposed.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Contact and Contradiction: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies. Maintain evidence discipline and document every medical trauma themes marker.

weeks.label: Week 1 - Recruitment And Baseline
weeks.objective: A patient record edited at 1:08 arrives by email with your profile in attending notes.
keyMoments: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

weeks.label: Week 2 - Contradiction Mapping
weeks.objective: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.

weeks.label: Week 3 - Escalation Window
weeks.objective: Run live interventions while antagonist pressure rises and trust fractures.
keyMoments: Restore names publicly vs protect descendants privately
Institutional abuse cover-up sustained by staff

weeks.label: Week 4 - Endgame And Debrief
weeks.objective: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.
keyMoments: Persistent record loop with nonhuman agency
A second institution shares the same nocturnal edit signature.

npcDossiers.notableSecret: Hospital Archivist Nella Ward can expose ward-1908-clue-pressure at high trust.
Former Nurse Evan Mire can expose ward-1908-clue-reveal at high trust.
Renovation Contractor Jo Pike can expose ward-1908-clue-origin at high trust.
Records Officer Hale Sorn can expose ward-1908-clue-pressure at high trust.

communityPuzzles.title: Intake Ledger Concordance
communityPuzzles.objective: Align patient IDs split across channels to reconstruct missing admissions.

shards.content: Host receives ward index numbers without names.
Ally A receives names without index order.
Broadcast includes admission dates needed to merge the two lists.

communityPuzzles.failureConsequence: The villain captures your partial decode and reroutes the final branch.
